positive: A minimalist, geometrically stylized portrait of a joyful fox leaping over a crescent moon. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco symmetry and modern abstract vector art. The composition must be centered, featuring clean, bold silhouettes of the fox and moon against a deep twilight sky gradient (indigo to violet). Use limited, highly contrasting colors: burnt orange, creamy gold, and slate gray. The line work must be precise and crisp, with a slight texture reminiscent of screen printing. The overall aesthetic should be suitable for a repeat pattern or a central graphic print on apparel, emphasizing negative space and strong visual impact. Highly detailed, vector graphic style, golden ratio composition.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, fuzzy, messy, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed body, bad anatomy, grain, distracting elements
